Assisted Reproductive Technology 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/assistedreproductivetechnology.html 
Assisted Reproductive Technology
Also called: ART, In Vitro Fertilization, IVF 
Summary 
Assisted reproductive technology (ART) is used to treat infertility . It includes fertility treatments that handle both eggs and sperm. It works by removing eggs from the ovaries. The eggs are then mixed with sperm to make embryos. The embryos are then put back in the parent's body. In vitro fertilization (IVF) is the most common and effective type o
